title.rendered: Trapdoor Cards and the Joy of Fast RAM

excerpt.rendered: An A1200's Chip RAM is fine; its Fast RAM is the upgrade you actually feel.

content.rendered:
Bare A1200s have 2MB of Chip RAM and nothing else. Snap a trapdoor card in and you'll add 4-8MB of Fast RAM that the CPU doesn't share with custom chips.

The effect is unsubtle: any task that isn't bottlenecked on Paula or Lisa runs at a speed that makes the same machine feel like a different generation.
